ham.subject: Ticket #1234 Resolved – Feature X Implementation Completed
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that ticket #1234 has been resolved. The feature X implementation has been merged into the main branch and deployed to staging. All unit tests pass and the regression tests have cleared.

Please review the changes on GitHub (commit ID: a1b2c3d) and let me know if you spot any issues. If everything looks good, we can close the ticket.

Thanks,
Alex

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected suspicious activity on your crypto wallet account (Account ID: 8F3B-XYZ123). As a result, your wallet has been temporarily suspended to protect your assets.

To restore full access, please verify your identity by submitting a copy of your government‑issued ID and a recent utility bill via the secure portal. Failure to comply within 48 hours may result in permanent account lockout.

Click here to verify: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Security Operations Team
CryptoSecure Inc.
